title: Accessible Virtual List

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Virtual List

Implement a virtual list component that allows users to efficiently render large datasets while maintaining accessibility features such as keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, and ARIA attributes.
requirements
1. The list should render at least 1000 items with a dynamic data source.
2. Users should be able to navigate the list using the keyboard (up, down, home, end).
3. Screen readers should be able to announce each item in the list.
4. The list should support both scrolling and keyboard navigation for items that are not currently in view.
5. The list should maintain focus on the selected item at all times.

constraints: Tailwind CSS classes must be used for styling.
The solution must adhere to ARIA guidelines for accessibility.
Keyboard navigation should be implemented using the `keydown` event.
Screen reader compatibility should be tested using a screen reader software (e.g., NVDA, JAWS).

gradingCriteria.description: The list renders at least 1000 items.
Users can navigate the list using the keyboard (up, down, home, end).
Screen readers can announce each item in the list.
The list supports both scrolling and keyboard navigation for items that are not currently in view.
The list maintains focus on the selected item at all times.
